headline: Conagra Brands invests in Mexico plant
summary: The US-based frozen foods and snacks producer said the investment “reinforces” its “growth strategy” and capacity in Mexico.

headline: Campbell's Vs General Mills: The Race For The Stronger Turnaround
summary: General Mills, Inc. and The Campbell's Company have fallen for 3 years but now yield 7%+. Click for this GIS and CPB stock comparison and see which I prefer.

headline: Conagra Brands: A High Yield With A $7 Billion Catch
summary: Conagra Brands (CAG) is rated Hold with a $10 target due to high leverage, margin pressure, and dividend sustainability concerns.

headline: Why Conagra (CAG) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of packaged foods company Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) jumped 3.7% in the afternoon session after a director made a significant stock purchase, signaling strong insider confidence in the company's future.
